description: The StripeMesh component generates mesh data that is used with a MeshRenderer.

fields.Points: The points used to generate the geometry for this mesh.
fields.SegmentPoints: How many cuts/bends are between each point. Higher means more detail
fields.DualSided: Whether this mesh is visible from the back and front.

usage: Attach this component to a slot and insert into a MeshRenderer to view the geometry. Don't forget to add a Material.
